name: claude-wow
description: Five-role multi-agent workflow for Claude Code — manager, senior-developer, pair-programmer, tester (core four) plus an optional Slacker role for Slack-integrated projects. Stories, plans, reviews, and browser-tested bugs coordinated over a single shared append-only message bus (JSONL). Peers address each other directly via `to` field (role-glob or agent ID); M orchestrates but doesn't route. Bus Monitors pre-filter at the OS layer via the bundled bus-tail filter so agents only see messages addressed to them.
